fn process_data(data: &[u8]) {
    for chunk in data.chunks(1024) {
        let text = std::str::from_utf8(chunk).unwrap();
        process_text(text);
    }
}

fn validate_batch(items: &[&str]) -> Vec<bool> {
    items.iter().map(|s| s.is_ascii()).collect()
}

fn filter_valid_utf8(chunks: &[Vec<u8>]) -> Vec<String> {
    chunks
        .iter()
        .map(|chunk| String::from_utf8(chunk.clone()).unwrap())
        .collect()
}

fn check_encoding(data: &[u8]) -> bool {
    std::str::from_utf8(data).is_ok()
}

fn process_text(_text: &str) {}
